Sacrificial Love

The Gift of
Generosity

Why Do We Give?
We give because God owns everything. He has given us what we have. God doesn’t need our money! The Bible teaches us that where our money is, that’s where our heart is also.

Ways to Give arrow_downward
"

Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver.

— 2 Corinthians 9:7

Ways to Give

Simple, secure ways to support the mission of GFGBC.

payments

Online Giving

A fast, secure way to give your tithes and offerings from anywhere. Set up recurring gifts or one-time donations.

Give Securely Online open_in_new
smartphone

Text to Give

Give instantly using your smartphone. Simple, quick, and secure.

Text "4Jesus" to

73256

Standard message & data rates may apply.

mail

In-Person or Mail

You can give in person by placing your tithe in the offering box during any of our worship services
or by mailing a check to our Rialto office.

Greater Faith Grace Bible Church
PO Box 1149
Rialto, CA 92376
volunteer_activism

Local Ministries

public

Global Missions

Our Impact Through Stewardship

Your tithes and offerings enable Greater Faith Grace Bible Church to sustain our local ministries, support missions abroad, and maintain our house of worship.

Every gift, regardless of size, plays a vital role in our mission to serve the Rialto community and spread the message of grace.

We are committed to financial transparency and responsible management of the resources entrusted to us.

GFGBC

Greater Faith
Grace Bible Church

A loving Church that cares for you. Reaching out in love.
